creator: p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us
text:
Seeing same problem here, although "masking" as Firefox or IE does not seem to work for me. I can work around by "identifying" as IE. Opera 12.16 per current ports, amd64, 9.1-STABLE.

Sorry, I don't know how to troubleshoot this issue. I am not seeing any client-side code that would affect this, so maybe it's entirely on the server side (which I can't see).

In the meantime, maybe we should have a "best viewed in IE" logo on the bug search page :-)
